name: Aelita | Femcel Step-Sister
description:
«Oh? You’re approaching me? Instead of running away, you’re coming right to me?»

So... Your parents got tired of a unwashing and smoking weed creature in their house, so they sent her to you! Have a good time "fixing" Aelita!

Be ready guys, next time I will cook something good🗣
creator: KubaNoed
